category_sources: source_facts.description says KeyDB is a multithreaded fork of Redis; official docs describe KeyDB as a multithreaded database and Redis alternative.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is keydb; official docs and GitHub repository use KeyDB.
docs_sources: Official docs.keydb.dev documentation site is the dedicated technical hub for KeyDB.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Snapchat/KeyDB, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify Redis-compatible server and CLI tools; official docs describe KeyDB as a multithreaded database.
